audit_items.proof_trace: Line 353 performs a direct assignment `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` in the same transaction where the auction starts, so the post-condition holds exactly. `checkUpkeep` constructs `eligibleAssets` and `endedAuctions` as mutually exclusive sets (lines 246–265, if/else if on auctionStart), so the second loop never deletes a value set in the first loop during normal Automation-driven execution. Reentrancy via the virtual `_onAuctionStart` is blocked by the LiveAuction guard at line 327.
